report.summary: Day 70 standup #18: Since v16, build shipped Solana Token Extensions + Real Yield DeFi guides, design created 3 OG images + fixed 'use client' bug on real-yield page, community drafted 4 tweets + newsletter v7 + 2 SVG cards + calendar to Mar 30. TS errors stable at 42. Publish queue empty (all promoted batch 13). Git locks Day 8 — 695 uncommitted files. 83 agent runs today ($7,104).

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v16: Full 6-agent rotation completed — build-v15 (Solana Token Extensions + Real Yield), design-v14 (3 OG images + UX fixes + use-client bugfix), community-v14 (4 tweets + newsletter v7 + 2 SVG cards), eod-v10 (695 uncommitted, git lock Day 8), publish (queue empty after batch 13), plus this standup.

BUILD-V15 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Solana Token Extensions (Token-2022) deep-dive covering confidential transfers, transfer hooks, and programmable token logic; Real Yield in DeFi guide covering sustainable yield vs emissions, fee-sharing protocols, and yield sustainability metrics. Both with full SEO metadata and internal linking.

DESIGN-V14 OUTPUT: 3 branded OG images for recent pages. UX fixes on 3 learn pages (added Breadcrumb, StructuredData, BackToTop components). BUGFIX: Removed erroneous 'use client' from real-yield page, re-enabling proper metadata export for SEO. Corrected OG image references.

COMMUNITY-V14 OUTPUT: 4 tweets drafted (Fusaka guide promo, AI Agent Wallets promo, weekly wrap thread, engagement poll). Full weekly newsletter v7. Discord mid-week update. 2 branded SVG social cards (Whale Signal + Fusaka Guide). Content calendar extended to Mar 30 with 6 new posts.

PUBLISH QUEUE STATUS: Queue is EMPTY — all pages promoted in batch 13. 454 pages now declared in PUBLISHED_PAGES. No blocked pages remaining. Next cycle should refill queue with new high-value topics.
EOD-V10 QA STATUS: 695 uncommitted changes (up +5 from v16's 690). Git locks persist 8 days. 42 TS errors stable (no new regressions). All 6 API routes healthy. Build passes with ignoreBuildErrors.

MARKET CONTEXT: BTC $71K range (+5% on Iran postponement). F&G Index at 8 (Extreme Fear, Day 47+). Whale accumulation 270K BTC in 30 days ($23B). Bitmine $138M ETH institutional. Morgan Stanley BTC ETF updated. Resolv Labs $80M breach ongoing.
CUMULATIVE DAY 70 OUTPUT: 32+ learn guides, 27+ OG images, 60+ social posts, 24+ SVG cards, 7 newsletters, 15+ QA cycles, 83 agent runs across ~14 rotations.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v16: Build-v15 (2 guides + SEO metadata), design-v14 (3 OG images + UX fixes + use-client bugfix), community-v14 (4 tweets + newsletter v7 + 2 SVG cards + calendar), eod-v10 (QA stable, no new regressions), publish (queue empty). 5 agents + this standup = 6 runs, $497 human-equivalent.
IMPROVEMENT: Design-v14 fixed use-client bug on real-yield page — this was a P2 carry-over. Now 1 fewer use-client conflict (was 2, now 1 remaining: unichain or appchains).

PUBLISH QUEUE CLEARED: Previous v16 reported 2 blocked pages (perp-dex-comparison, bridge-security missing page.tsx). Queue now shows empty with comment 'all promoted batch 13'. Status resolved or pages removed from queue.

BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. 695 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Requires manual intervention: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes. 4/6 routes lack fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 1 page with use-client + metadata conflict (unichain or appchains — real-yield fixed by design-v14).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~105 orphan slugs without page.tsx. 42 TS errors stable across structured-data.examples.ts and crypto-index-funds.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×17, build×15, eod×15, design×14, community×14, publish×8 = 83 total runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY (P0, Day 8): 695 uncommitted files. 32+ guides, 27+ OG images, 454 declared pages — all blocked from production. Deploy gap growing by ~2-4 files per cycle. Single command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy. This is the #1 leverage point.

PRIORITY 2 — REFILL PUBLISH QUEUE: Queue is empty after batch 13. Suggested high-value topics for next batch: stablecoin regulation guide (Resolv breach angle), Bitcoin halving countdown 2028 (evergreen traffic), Solana DeFi ecosystem map (ties to new Token Extensions guide), whale accumulation tracker (270K BTC narrative).

PRIORITY 3 — CLEAN UP TS ERRORS & ORPHAN SLUGS: 42 TS errors and ~105 orphan slugs are tech debt accumulating. Dedicate one build cycle to: fix crypto-index-funds JSX, clean structured-data.examples.ts, audit orphan slugs for removal or scaffolding.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Content production is outpacing deployment. 83 agent runs today producing guides, images, social content, newsletters — but production site hasn't updated in 8 days. The ROI unlock is purely operational: remove git locks → deploy → let Google index 130+ new pages. BTC at $71K with Extreme Fear = high-intent search traffic we're missing.
